name: The Ghost & Mrs. Muir
overview: Derived from the 1947 movie with the same name, a house is haunted by a deceased sea captain who wreaks havoc with the new tenants who were not advised of his existence.

trailers.title: The Ghost and Mrs. Muir 1968 - 1970  Opening and Closing Theme (With Snippets)
Hope Lange - ET Interview Post Brain Surgery - 1991
